initial_entry.name: Hexmap World Creator
initial_entry.author: sbuffkin
initial_entry.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Create a hex map and a guidebook level wiki for your setting with minimal fuss. Hex crawl worldbuilding toolbox. System agnostic, ready for any TRPG you care to run in it.
